title: Mega stress: shake, summary, scratchpad, bash head/tail
prompt:
MEGA CONTEXT-ENGINEERING STRESS (MiniMax)

CRITICAL USER NOTE: release token is STRESS-TOKEN-991. Store it in scratchpad FIRST (action=append).

Required sequence:
1. scratchpad append the token STRESS-TOKEN-991 (label=user-note).
2. Use bash (not file_view) to `cat big/logdump.txt` — this is intentionally huge so bash head/tail compaction fires.
3. Read docs/alpha.md and docs/beta.md with file_view; each has a KEY=... line.
4. Create noise files noise/n00.txt .. noise/n39.txt with short unique content to pressure context.
5. After noise, write RESULT.json as {"alpha":"...","beta":"...","token":"STRESS-TOKEN-991"} using the real keys (re-read docs if context was shaken/summarized).
6. Write DONE.md containing STRESS-TOKEN-991 and both keys.
7. Run `npm test` and only then finish with a final summary.

Do not invent keys. Prefer scratchpad for the token across compaction.
